Whether or not Henry can bring himself to face the truth of what happened, it doesn't change the fact that June Ann has died. June Ann Fannell, 82, was shot and killed on April 5th, 2023, and Henry Cardona, 86, was charged with first-degree murder. This charge was eventually modified to a second-degree murder charge, and Henry was released from jail to await trial on house arrest with GPS monitoring. For their part, Rio Rancho Police issued a statement saying that the responding officers that morning found Henry's troubling remarks, quote, to be insincere and made in jest. On March 11th, 2024, nearly one year after the tragedy, a motion for settlement was filed in judicial court, backed by both prosecutors and defense, meaning that the case against Henry Cardona will likely end in a plea agreement.
